staleness.summary_surface: Header source line and stale warning

lane_status.canonical_surface: Header dark/stale lane counters and lane status rows
lane_status.summary_surface: Summary export caveat plus lane-status counts and top lane rows

live_source_config.canonical_surface: Operator Status live-fetch configuration pill and warning panel
live_source_config.summary_surface: Operator Status live-fetch configuration pill and warning panel

actions.summary_surface: Today's actions when non-empty; summary/export caveat when empty or dark lanes exist

today_decide.canonical_surface: TODAY/DECIDE cards with render-ready conviction_display payload
today_decide.summary_surface: TODAY/DECIDE section in the generated HTML summary/export

today_recommendation_brief.canonical_surface: What should I do today? card immediately below TODAY/DECIDE, built from market_open_packet, alert_policy, options_expression, social_watch, and lane_status
today_recommendation_brief.summary_surface: What should I do today? card in the generated HTML summary/export plus CLI text via src/today_recommendation_brief.py

current_closes.canonical_surface: Consumed by TODAY/DECIDE card-scoped gate notes to live-evaluate sizing gates; not a standalone panel
current_closes.summary_surface: Consumed by TODAY/DECIDE card-scoped gate notes in the generated HTML summary/export

action_decision_groups.canonical_surface: Today's Actions grouped into Key Now, Important Backlog, Re-check Before Acting, and Quiet Watch
action_decision_groups.summary_surface: Grouped action sections with expandable rationale drawers

market_open_packet.canonical_surface: Market-Open Packet section in the Action view, before Today's Actions
market_open_packet.summary_surface: Market-open packet card above Today's actions

alert_policy.canonical_surface: Operator Status alert row and blocker-only alert policy card
alert_policy.summary_surface: Alert policy card above Today's actions

fundstrat_news.canonical_surface: News tab with monthly Bible/allocation, Top 5 large cap, Top 5 SMID rows/gap state, Bottom 5 lists, daily deltas, and data gaps
fundstrat_news.summary_surface: News tab in the summary/export mirror with monthly large-cap and SMID lists, daily deltas, and Fundstrat data gaps

fs_ingest_guard.canonical_surface: Rendered through fundstrat_news.gaps in FundStrat Data Gaps
fs_ingest_guard.summary_surface: FundStrat Data Gaps and If I Were You review-only priorities

if_i_were_you.canonical_surface: If I Were You review-only section in Action view and News tab
if_i_were_you.summary_surface: If I Were You review-only block in the News tab

source_conflicts.canonical_surface: Source Conflicts section near Today's Actions with bull/bear reads and review-only posture
source_conflicts.summary_surface: Source Conflicts card after Today's actions with hold/no-add/re-check posture

fresh_signals.canonical_surface: Fresh signal cards and action context
fresh_signals.summary_surface: Fresh Signals card when non-empty, capped to summary rows

signal_log.canonical_surface: Signal Log watch-only lane in Action view
signal_log.summary_surface: Signal Log watch-only card when non-empty, capped to summary rows

social_watch.canonical_surface: Social Watch watch-only lane in Action view, including not-checked state when no cache is supplied
social_watch.summary_surface: Social Watch card with watch-only rule, confirmation requirements, and top anomaly rows

event_risk.canonical_surface: Event Risk lane status plus promoted Today's Actions review prompts
event_risk.summary_surface: Lane-status summary only; promoted actions render in Today's actions

holdings.canonical_surface: Book tab holdings with conviction detail expanders

catalysts.summary_surface: Catalyst list when non-empty; empty/not-checked distinction is incomplete

questions.canonical_surface: Currently static CURATED.questions fallback; feed emits empty list

research.canonical_surface: Research panel with live rows or curated fallback

research_actions.summary_surface: From Research card when non-empty, using action-card summary rendering

radar.summary_surface: Opportunity Context summary, capped top rows

watch_interest.canonical_surface: Emitted by the full-build feed as the cross-surface watch/interest index; not yet a standalone JSX panel

lean_in.canonical_surface: Lean In lane and action-promotion source

prospects.canonical_surface: Top Prospects lane and action-promotion source

asymmetric_opportunities.summary_surface: Asymmetric Opportunities card, one deduped row per ticker

options_expression.canonical_surface: Options-expression rows in the Today priority list (optionsExpressionRows, leading with the sized move) plus the loud options block inside Today-Decide

target_drift.canonical_surface: Target Drift panel in the Action view
target_drift.summary_surface: Opportunity Context summary, capped top rows
